name: Dorze Lodge
description: The accommodation package includes breakfast for 2 guests. The Dorze lodge is the perfect place to meet the Dorze community, known to be not only Ethiopia's best weavers (mainly men who weave in this community), but also very good carpenters. Located at the entrance of the village, the lodge is made up of several traditional round huts made of stone with a straw roof. Each bungalow has its own terrace, which allows to relax while contemplating the landscape. The common room also has a terrace where you can eat, with breathtaking views, and offers an exhibition of handicrafts made by villagers, especially young people. The Dorze lodge is located on the edge of a forest where pine trees sit alongside huge bamboos and at the edge of a high plateau, at an altitude of 2800 meters and offers breathtaking views of the valley and the Abaya and Chamo lakes. who take beautiful pinkish tints at sunset. Staying at the Dorze lodge allows you to relax and stroll while admiring the scenery, while living an important immersion with the Dorzé community. Going down into the valley, you can make a small excursion on Lake Chamo where you can admire many birds and observe crocodiles and hippopotamuses. The Ðorzé lodge was created by Tsehai, a former guide of the region, in agreement with the Dorzé community, to allow the improvement of their living conditions especially for women and young people. The lodge is entirely run by the village youth, the supply is local and all the income is distributed among the different families. In addition, Tsehai helped, with the help of a Polish association, to build two new classrooms for the village school.
